name: Polish Finance Tracker
description: improve everything from the fuctions to the design and to the responsiveness, i want it fully functional

goal.answer: Modernize the design, fix responsive issues (especially the mobile date overlap), and add production-ready assets (PWA manifest, service worker, meta tags) to make Chel's Finance Hub fully polished and ready for live hosting with zero functional regressions.

criteria.answer:
Visual polish: typography, spacing, shadows, colors, and transitions are consistently modernized across all UI sections. Verified by visual inspection in Chrome/Firefox at 1920px, 1024px, 768px, and 390px viewports.
Mobile date overlap fixed: the month selector in the hero section displays correctly on phone screens without overlapping text, buttons, labels, or other elements. Verified by DevTools responsive testing at ≤640px width.
Responsive modal & table UX: all modals are vertically scrollable and fully accessible; tables do not trigger horizontal page scroll on mobile; all interactive elements have ≥44px touch targets. Verified by DevTools responsive testing at 320px–640px.
Production hosting ready: app includes a valid manifest.json, a service worker for offline caching, and proper <head> meta tags (viewport, charset, description, theme-color, Open Graph). Verified by file existence + Lighthouse PWA check.
Zero functional regressions: Firebase sync, all CRUD flows (bills, expenses, groceries, loans, savings), CSV export, cash flow table, and loan schedule rendering remain fully functional. Verified by manual end-to-end walkthrough of each feature with zero console errors.

constraints.answer: Keep the existing single-file vanilla JavaScript/HTML architecture., Do not add build tools, bundlers, or frontend frameworks., Preserve the existing Firebase configuration and anonymous auth flow., All changes must remain compatible with static file hosting.

assumptions.answer: The user will test the final result by opening index.html in a browser or deploying to static hosting.; No backend or Firebase Firestore schema changes are required.; "Production ready" means client-side PWA assets and SEO meta tags, not server-side configuration.

phases.name: Polish & Productionize
phases.goal: Modernize design, fix responsive bugs, and add production assets in a single pass.
phases.description: One comprehensive phase covering: (1) creating manifest.json and service worker + updating HTML <head> with production meta tags, (2) fixing the mobile hero date overlap and auditing all responsive behavior, (3) modernizing the CSS design system with refined tokens, typography, animations, and polished interactive states, and (4) running a full end-to-end regression test plus Lighthouse audit to confirm zero regressions and PWA readiness.

steps.description: Create manifest.json and sw.js, and inject production <head> meta tags (manifest link, theme-color, description, Open Graph, apple-mobile-web-app).

verification.command: test -f manifest.json && test -f sw.js && grep -q 'manifest.json' index.html && grep -q 'og:title' index.html

steps.description: Fix responsive layout bugs: prevent hero date button overlap on mobile, ensure all modals scroll without clipping, ensure tables handle small screens gracefully, enforce minimum 44px touch targets.

verification.command: Open DevTools, set viewport to 390x844, confirm the month selector inside .hero does not overlap text or buttons and is fully tappable.

steps.description: Modernize CSS design: refine color tokens, improve typography hierarchy, add subtle animations/transitions, polish cards/buttons/inputs with modern hover/focus states and consistent spacing.

verification.command: grep -q 'animation\|@keyframes\|transition:.*transform' index.html && visual inspection at 1920px, 1024px, and 390px confirms modern consistent styling without regressions.

steps.description: End-to-end regression test and Lighthouse audit: manually walk through bills, expenses, groceries, loans, savings, CSV export, and cash flow; confirm browser console shows zero errors; run Lighthouse to verify manifest and service worker are detected.

verification.command: Manual checklist: add/edit/delete for each feature type works; console shows 0 errors; Lighthouse reports manifest and service worker detected.

phases.summary: Phase 1 "Polish & Productionize" completed. All 4 steps delivered: (1) PWA manifest, service worker, and production meta tags; (2) mobile hero date overlap fix with normalized input appearance, 44px touch targets, and confirmed existing modal/table responsiveness; (3) modern CSS design system with 44 custom properties, fadeInUp/fadeIn animations, hover/focus micro-interactions, and typography hierarchy; (4) comprehensive regression audit verifying file validity, HTTP serving, CSS token integrity, JS function presence, and zero regressions.

grade.rationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.
